milestones: Successfully navigated terrain without getting stuck.

qa_report.oak_visibility: Massive Oaks are clearly identifiable by their darker green color and significantly thicker trunks compared to standard trees, making them easy to spot even from a distance.
qa_report.chopping_intuition: Chopping felt very responsive. The visual feedback of wood chips flying provided a clear indication of progress toward felling the tree.
qa_report.physics_dragging: The massive log felt appropriately heavy but was movable with sustained pushing. Navigating it toward the river was intuitive using the WASD movement.
